name: cognitive-deadlift
description: A skill-retention harness for developers using AI coding assistants.

interface.shortDescription: Keep developer judgment in the loop while using AI.
interface.longDescription: Cognitive Deadlift is a skill-retention harness for AI-assisted development. It uses reusable skills, context packs, harness fixtures, and lightweight checks to preserve problem framing, code reading, behavioral testing, tradeoff analysis, diff review, and plain-English explanation.
defaultPrompt: Run an assumption audit on this plan.
Interrogate this diff before I merge it.
